output.level_rationale: Manager title at established company (DoorDash scale not stated but implied mid-to-large) aligns with L4. JD does not explicitly state years required, reporting line, or executive scope. title suggests IC or first-line manager role. Assuming 3–5 year profile for the posted level given standard Manager seniority.
output.summary: Strong fit: eight years in Strategy and Operations at Google with proven program ownership, analytics depth (SQL, BigQuery, Looker), and commercial operations scale. Commercial Operations experience translates directly to marketplace and GTM operations. Gap: JD is incomplete (no full scope or KPIs stated), and candidate lacks explicit DoorDash-domain or marketplace verticalization experience, but core S&O capabilities and emerging-tech integration (LLM tooling) mitigate risk.
uncertainties: JD snapshot is incomplete; full responsibilities, team scope, and reporting structure are not provided in cached text
DoorDash company size/stage context not stated in Role JSON, limiting level confidence
